DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Continued To Jan-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DONALD PIPKINS, TEL. NO. 871-6339, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS continued to January 25, 2013 to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 am. Moving party is required to provide a courtesy copy of the complaint as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C to Department 501 by 4:00 pm on January 7, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
